text:
Sarahell (サラヘル, Saraheru) is 2 nd Prince Camilla's Captain of the Guards. Like the rest of Camilla's guards, Sarahell is a Have-Not, and is the one in charge of killing 14 th Prince Woble through a Nen curse. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Sarahell is a woman of an imposing figure. She has short, fair hair styled in spikes that point towards the left side of her head. She wears eyeliner in the upper corner of her eyes and has prominent nasolabial folds. 

She is normally seen wearing the standard uniform of Camilla's personal guards, but in her first appearance, she is seen wearing a suit in Room 1002 shortly after Camilla returns from the departure ceremony. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 363 

Personality

Like the other Have-Nots, Sarahell is immensely devoted to Camilla, being not only willing but even eager to die for her sake, claiming that she has nothing to lose. Her enthusiasm, however, is not pure fanaticism, as she admonished other personal guards to remind them that their lives (and deaths) must be of strategic value to Camilla rather than simply aiming to kill another Prince. Sarahell herself plans to cast her curse while fully embracing the possibility that it will fail to kill her target. 

She occasionally lapses into informality while speaking, especially when startled. She is confident she has nerves of steel and is skilled at hiding hatred with love. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On the first day of the voyage, Sarahell stands close by to Moswana and their employer 2 nd Prince Camilla as Camilla complains about Musse, the man of her brother 1 st Prince Benjamin sent by him to join her guard. She instructs her men to keep Benjamin's man out of her sight and says that he would be dead if he stepped in the living room, before she orders them to get her "mummy". 

The night of the second day of the voyage, Camilla's guards hear gunshots from Room 1002's servants' quarters and immediately rush toward the source of the sound, only to find a locked door blocking their path. As some try to force the locked door, Sarahell orders the others to go around towards the other entrance before helping force open the locked door. They break in with guns drawn and see blood on the floor, but Camilla is seemingly unharmed, so they ask her what had happened. The location where this incident happens most likely is the servants' quarters. If this is true, several panels from Chapter 373 include a door drawn on the wrong side, and a wall where a recess should be, judging from the layout of the Princes' rooms given in Chapter 363. Camilla tells them that Musse shot her and escaped and that she was going after him to execute him, then orders them to incinerate his personal belongings. Sarahell and Umanma try to calm Camilla down and dissuade her from chasing after Musse, but Camilla tells them to shut up, asking them if they are prepared to defy Benjamin in her place and have their families slaughtered. Sarahell turns to 2 nd Queen Duazul and asks for her help in talking Camilla down, but Duazul tells them to let her do as she wishes and orders them to stay behind. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 373 

On the tenth day of the voyage, Sarahell discusses Shikaku's suicide with the other guards, warning them of the possibility of him having used a haunting type ability. She ponders the presence of Exorcists in the Hunter Association who would be willing to remove the Have-Nots' curses and considers sending one to test the hypothesis. She summons Fukataki so she can estimate how long specific curses will take to kill the target if sent from the VVIP quarters or Room 1002. The majordomo points out that the Guardian Spirit Beasts would likely deflect them unless cast from close enough to touch the target. Sarahell thus decides to approach and curse Prince Woble during the next set of Nen lessons. 

Equipment

Handgun: Sarahell wields a handgun of unknown brand and caliber. 

Abilities & Powers

Despite possessing a Nen ability, Sarahell did not appear to be much stronger than a regular human physically, since she could be delayed by a locked door, although she was ultimately the one who broke it open, possibly suggesting that she is stronger than some of the other bodyguards. 

Nen

Sarahell is well-versed in the mechanics of haunting type Nen abilities and exorcisms and is capable of casting a curse herself. Her physical strength falling within the ordinary spectrum might suggest that Hatsu is the only technique she can perform, with the possible exception of Ten. 

Manga Appearances

Quotes

(To Nukuocon and Cavic) "We use our lives for Second Prince Camilla and the future, not dead princes! Second Prince Camilla gave us a choice when we weren't even human." 
(To Fukataki) "Quell hate with love. I'm good at it." 

Trivia

The furigana name of the Have-Nots' curse is derived from Japanese mythology, specifically to Izanami's inability to leave the underworld due to having eaten of its food.
The kanji name of the curse, "Tsujitsuma Awase ni Umareta Bokura", is derived from a song by Amazarashi.
Viz localized the curse's name as "Dust in the Wind: Hell Fruit".
